title: Wound
description: A named injury type — the vocabulary of harm (FR-INJ-01). Static definition only: a live wound (its treatment progress, the day it was inflicted, its body site) lives in GameState.player.condition.wounds, created from this definition when damage lands. Health is treated, not auto-regenerated (FR-INJ-04): a wound leaves the body only when its care reaches completion, never on its own with time.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form wound.<slug>, e.g. "wound.laceration".

description.description: How the wound reads in the Scene (ICU MessageFormat string).

severity.description: Baseline severity (0-100) a fresh wound of this type carries. Treatment reduces the untreated remainder; time alone never does (FR-INJ-04).

effect.description: The gameplay handle this wound exerts while untreated (FR-INJ-01): bleed (ongoing cost), slow (time/stamina tax), weaken (reduced capability), infect-risk (feeds the FR-INJ-05 infection track, M-later).

treatedBy.description: Item content ids whose use advances this wound's treatment. Empty/absent means only time-plus-care generic first aid applies.

notes.description: Author commentary (JSON has no comments, ADR-0002).
